note.description: Status update text to store in the application log

created_by.description: Who authored the status update; defaults to Assistant for MCP-created notes

sync_status_summary.description: When true or omitted, also update application.status_summary to the same note

direction.description: "ours" = we promised them, "theirs" = they promised us

portfolio_rank.description: Positive integer for ordering within the portfolio

focus_implementation_id.description: Application UUID to focus the sprint on

is_high_priority.description: Boosts priority_score for tasks that mention this stakeholder

blocked_reason.description: Structured category for why the task is blocked

implementation_id.description: Application UUID to link to. Ignored when project_id is set and that project has an application — the task inherits the project's application.

section_id.description: Project section UUID to link to

sprint_id.description: Sprint UUID to assign the task to

source_type.description: Source label, e.g. Manual or Recurring

blocked_by_task_id.description: Task UUID this new task should depend on

initial_comment.description: Creates first comment on the task

id.description: Typed search result id such as record:task:<id>, email:<id>, or calendar:<id>

save_to_log.description: When true or omitted, save the generated snippet to the application status update log

date.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to today ET.

since.description: Optional ISO timestamp to define the activity window for midday/eod updates.

date.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to today ET.

since.description: Optional ISO timestamp to define the activity window for midday/eod updates.

date.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to today ET.
ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to today ET.
ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to today ET and reviews the current month-to-date.

persist.description: When true, also persist the monthly snapshot.

date.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to today ET and reviews the current week-to-date.

persist.description: When true, also persist the weekly snapshot for later monthly review.

entity_id.description: Entity id or canonical encoded calendar entity id

limit.description: Maximum number of log entries to return; defaults to 10

entity_id.description: Entity id for task, implementation, project, stakeholder, commitment, sprint, or encoded calendar entity id

with_stats.description: Include task counts, blocker count, and linked application info

search.description: Search by name, email, or organization

tag.description: Filter to tasks containing this lowercase tag

due_soon.description: Due within 48 hours, excluding Done and Parked

scope_type.description: What kind of thing to focus on

next_due.description: Next scheduled date YYYY-MM-DD. Defaults from task due date or today.

day_of_month.description: For monthly schedules, preferred day of month

task_ids.description: Task UUIDs to keep on Today

entity_id.description: Entity id or canonical encoded calendar entity id

focus_implementation_id.description: Application UUID or null to unlink

is_high_priority.description: Boosts priority_score for tasks that mention this stakeholder

context.description: Structured stakeholder memory to merge into existing context

blocked_reason.description: Structured category for why the task is blocked

implementation_id.description: Application UUID or null. Overridden by the project's application when the task belongs to a project that has one.

project_id.description: Project UUID or null to unlink

section_id.description: Project section UUID or null to unlink

sprint_id.description: Sprint UUID or null to unlink

stakeholder_mentions.description: Replace the stakeholder name mentions on the task

priority_score.description: New base priority 0-100; urgency/stakeholder/due-date boosts are applied on top
